clusters.name: The Ninth Terrace
clusters.description: Neutral ground between two Thrones — amber light, carved stone, and careful silence.

clusters.name: The Sovereignty
clusters.description: Function over form. The future rendered in metal and light — not inherited, built.

clusters.name: The Ascendancy
clusters.description: Ancient lineage, living tradition. Their ships carry history in every curve and carved relief.

locations.name: Grand Promenade
locations.description: The outermost tier — a golden tree-lined avenue where luminara trees cast amber light over carved stone. Every path on the Terrace leads here.

connections.label: Stone stairs climb toward the Council tier
Through an amber-lit archway off the avenue
A modest storefront along the promenade
The avenue opens into the commercial district
A wide ramp descends to the military port
Service stairs spiral down to the civilian port

locations.name: Council Chambers
locations.description: Where the Council of Nine decides the Terrace's fate. Nine seats in a crescent facing the stars.

connections.label: Broad stairs descend to the avenue below
The lift rises to the observation dome
A monitored passage to the diplomatic wing

locations.name: Observatory Deck
locations.description: The highest point on the Terrace — a transparent dome where you stand in the void.

connections.label: A sealed lift descends from the dome

locations.name: Envoy Wing
locations.description: The diplomatic quarter — identical suites for both Thrones. Every meeting here is observed.

connections.label: Back through secured corridors to the Council
A sky bridge to the commercial district

locations.name: DriftNet Lounge
locations.description: Bar, intelligence exchange, and neutral ground. Gossip is currency. Silence is expensive.

connections.label: Back to the promenade’s amber glow
A quiet corridor to the residential tier

locations.name: Prism Appraisal Shop
locations.description: Idris’s modest establishment. A Paragon pretending to be a retired jeweller.

connections.label: Step back onto the tree-lined avenue

locations.name: Terrace Market
locations.description: The commercial heart — a multi-level bazaar where time dilation turns into economic advantage.

connections.label: Back through the avenue to the promenade
The sky bridge to the diplomatic wing
Down through the market to Idris’s shop
Freight lifts descend to the training chambers

locations.name: Cultivation Halls
locations.description: Vast training chambers under time dilation. Both Thrones covet access.

connections.label: Lifts return to the market above

locations.name: Shared Quarters
locations.description: Officers’ quarters where two lives were built together — warm amber lighting, a weapon rack by the door.

connections.label: Back to the lounge through residential corridors
Through the door into the blue-lit corridor

locations.name: Corridor
locations.description: Cool blue lighting, angular architecture, running lights pointing away. Three departures happened here.

connections.label: The corridor leads back to quarters
Running lights point toward departure

locations.name: Transport Dock
locations.description: Military secondary port — boarding ramps extend to waiting transports, engine glow adds warmth to industrial steel.

connections.label: The wide ramp climbs back to the promenade
The corridor stretches toward residential quarters
Ramps descend to the civilian port
Board the Sovereignty military transport

locations.name: Lower Docks
locations.description: The working port — supplies arrive, refugees are processed, smugglers run Prisms between Thrones.

connections.label: Stairs climb from the docks to the promenade
Up the ramps to the military dock
An Ascendancy shuttle waits at berth seven

locations.name: Transport Interior
locations.description: Sovereignty military transport — the vessel that carried futures apart.

connections.label: Disembark back to the Terrace docks
Through the vessel’s main corridor

locations.name: Transport Bay
locations.description: Where Sera met Commandant Reva Orin. Sharp Sovereignty design — function over form, no history in the walls.

connections.label: Back through the transport corridor
To the observation viewport

locations.name: Convoy View
locations.description: Dozens of military vessels in formation — the scale of what Sera chose rendered visible.

connections.label: Return to the transport bay
The convoy docks at Vantage Station

locations.name: Vantage Concourse
locations.description: The Sovereignty’s welcome — biometric kiosks, polished composite, and a star field overhead. Show up, be useful, belong.

connections.label: Back to the docking approach
Observation deck overlooking the station exterior
Industrial lifts descend to the engineering levels
Express lift to the Command Spire

locations.name: Vantage Station
locations.description: The Sovereignty’s answer to the Forgetting — not inherited, built. The future in metal and light.

connections.label: Back into the station concourse

locations.name: The Crucible
locations.description: Where the Sovereignty builds tomorrow’s weapons today. Sparks, schematics, and the sound of iteration.

connections.label: Lifts return to the concourse above
Data conduits run from the labs to the outer ring

locations.name: Command Spire
locations.description: The nerve centre — transparent walls, tactical holographics, and the weight of a thousand worlds in every decision.

connections.label: Express lift down to the concourse
A sealed transit tube to the outer ring

locations.name: Signal Array
locations.description: The edge of Sovereignty space — antenna forests, encrypted frequencies, and signals that haven’t arrived yet.

connections.label: The transit tube returns to Command
Data conduits lead back to the labs

locations.name: Ascendancy Pavilion
locations.description: An ornate reception hall aboard the Ascendancy vessel — gilded arches, living vines, and the scent of old incense.

connections.label: The shuttle returns to the Terrace docks
Gilded corridors lead deeper into the vessel

locations.name: Ascendancy Sanctum
locations.description: Where bloodline becomes authority. An obsidian disc, acoustic perfection, and ten thousand years of unbroken genealogy overhead.

connections.label: Through gilded corridors to the reception hall
An archway opens onto the living gallery
Through living roots to the gardens
A ceremonial passage to the anchorage

locations.name: The Living Gallery
locations.description: History rendered in light and living stone. Every surface tells a story the Sovereignty would rather forget.

connections.label: Return through the archway to the Sanctum
A spiralling ramp ascends to the overlook
A sealed passage leads to the vault

locations.name: Ascendancy Overlook
locations.description: Where tradition meets the void — ancient vessel designs in formation, carrying ten thousand years of inherited purpose.

connections.label: The ramp spirals down to the gallery

locations.name: The Root Gardens
locations.description: Ten thousand years of continuous cultivation. Species extinct everywhere else survive here because the Ascendancy never stopped tending.

connections.label: The roots reach deepest near the seat of power

locations.name: The Reliquary
locations.description: The vault of things the Ascendancy refuses to let the universe forget. Each artefact in a pool of warm light, the surrounding darkness absolute.

connections.label: Return through the sealed passage to the gallery

locations.name: Meridian Anchorage
locations.description: The Ascendancy’s answer to Vantage — except Meridian wasn’t built. It was inherited. Ten thousand years of city lights below.

connections.label: The ceremonial passage returns to the Sanctum
